case_title: KATERINA B ANTYPAS VS. JULIE FELLOM ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED JAN-19-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NEIGHBORHOOD PLAYGARDEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $200. SERVED MAY-03-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEIGHBORHOOD PLAYGARDEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-09-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF KATERINA B. ANTYPAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIE FELLOM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEIGHBORHOOD PLAY GARDEN IS NOT PRESENT, IT DOES NOT EXISIT. DEFENDANT JUNIPER BERRY PLAY GARDEN NOT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HER CASE AGAINST JUNIPER BERRY PLAY GARDEN. DEFENDANT JULIE FELLOM ADMITS FULL LIABILITY TO THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$129.00) SERVED JAN-19-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FELLOM, JULIE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,075.00 FILED BY ANTYPAS, KATERINA B AS TO DEFENDANT FELLOM, JULIE JUNIPER BERRY PLAYGARDEN NEIGHBORHOOD PLAYGARDEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT NEIGHBORHOOD PLAYGARDEN TO JUN-09-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KATERINA B ANTYPAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JULLIE FELLOM, JUNIPER BERRY PLAYGARDEN AND NEIGHBORHOOD PLAYGARDEN ARE NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMS PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT NEIGHBORHOOD PLAYGARDEN IS INVALID. THE CORRECT ADDRESS FOR AGENT FOR SERVICE "61 GRANDVIEW AVE., SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114" WAS NOT SERVED PURSUANT TO THE SERVICE INFORMATION LISTED WITH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO RE-SERVE CLAIM TO THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT NEIGHBORHOOD PLAYGARDEN. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO RE-SERVE CLAIM FOR DEFENDANTS JULIE FELLOM AND JUNIPER BERRY PLAYGARDEN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2023 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$175.00) SERVED JAN-20-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JUNIPER BERRY PLAYGARDEN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION DEFENDANT(NEIGHBORHOOD PLAYGARDEN) ADDRESS CHANGE, TO ADD THE AGENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANTYPAS, KATERINA B

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANTYPAS, KATERINA B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FELLOM, JULIE NEIGHBORHOOD PLAYGARDEN $3,277.50 PRINCIPAL, $179.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,456.50, DEFENDANT JULIE FELLOM TESTIFIED SHE CLOSED THE NEIGHBORHOOD PLAY GARDEN. SHE ADMITTED SHE OWED PLAINTIFF $3277.50 AND WILL TRY TO MAKE $100 MONTHLY PAYMENTS. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JUNIPER BERRY PLAYGARDEN IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
